summary: W-9 View Button Bug Fix Verified - Both Edit Employee Modal and Employee Portal view buttons successfully open PDFs in new window/tab using window.open() with fallback to download if popup blocked

edit_employee_modal_view_w9.details: Clicked Eye icon on W-9 document in Edit Employee modal - new page/tab was created successfully (Pages: 1 -> 2)

employee_portal_view_w9.details: Clicked Eye icon (data-testid='view-w9-*') on W-9 document in Employee Dashboard - new page/tab was created successfully (Pages: 1 -> 2)

popup_fallback_download.details: Code review confirms fallback download is implemented if popup is blocked - uses link.click() method

admin_dashboard_view_w9.implementation: Uses window.open(url, '_blank', 'noopener,noreferrer') with fallback to link.click() download if popup blocked

employee_dashboard_view_w9.implementation: Uses window.open(url, '_blank', 'noopener,noreferrer') with fallback to link.click() download if popup blocked

test_credentials.admin_login: Enter code '4399' in email field on /login page

seed_data_creation: Used existing data - Lisa Martinez with 3 W-9 documents
context_for_next_testing_agent: W-9 view button fix verified working in both Admin Edit Employee modal and Employee Portal. Implementation uses window.open() with blob URL and fallback download if popup blocked.
